message:
feat(tui,cli): TUI v2 enhancements, CLI robot/bench commands, workspace updates

TUI Server (br-2bbt):
- tui_app.rs: ~400 lines of new event handling, toast notification system
  with severity filtering and event-type mappings, enhanced keyboard
  navigation, screen transition animations, and status bar improvements
- tui_screens/reservations.rs: expanded reservation list view with
  sortable columns, expiry countdown, conflict highlighting, and
  bulk release actions
- tui_widgets.rs: refactored widget rendering with consistent styling,
  improved table layout calculations, and responsive column sizing

CLI:
- lib.rs: ~228 new lines integrating robot and bench subcommands,
  expanded CLI dispatch with structured JSON output modes
- bench.rs (new): benchmark harness for measuring MCP operation latencies
  (send, fetch, search, reservation cycle) with statistical aggregation
- robot.rs (new): machine-readable CLI output for CI/automation
  integration with JSON-structured status, health, and diagnostic reports

Tools:
- products.rs, resources.rs: minor fixes for consistency

Benchmarks:
- Updated benchmark harness for current API surface

Workspace:
- Cargo.toml: added search-core crate to workspace members
- Cargo.lock: dependency resolution updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
